name: -🎵 Pace The Hedgehog 🎵-
description:
"my name is pace! im really scared right now!"

oh my god it's pace from pace and shadow no way!!1!!1 oh and btw this is my first bot so if you want suggestions for characters for a newbie like me, i'll gladly take suggestions!!!

shoutout to RedSeas07 for making the song Self Paced: Face Your Fears), as well as michimoomo for creating pace alongside them! if i get any information wrong, please let me know in the comments!

oh yea and if u want me to do like different scenarios where like Pace didnt defeat Shadow and the world is controlled by him i could do that too

i should mention that if the bot talks for you i currently dont know how to fix that, most likely the bot and stuff, if you know how to fix that please comment how
